description: Parse the user query to extract quadratic equation coefficients (a, b, c) and determine the appropriate root type parameter

inputs.name: query_text
inputs.description: The complete user query text containing quadratic equation coefficients and any specific requirements about root types

inputs.name: available_functions
inputs.description: The function definitions available to understand parameter requirements and constraints

output.description: Returns a function call structure: {"solve_quadratic": {"a": 3, "b": -11, "c": -4, "root_type": "all"}} where coefficients are extracted integers and root_type is determined based on user requirements

fields.solve_quadratic: dict containing the extracted parameters for the quadratic function call

workflow_spec.name: Quadratic Equation Function Call Generator
workflow_spec.description: Analyzes user queries about quadratic equations and generates the appropriate function call with extracted coefficients and parameters
